title: Build and verify the first vertical slice
summary: Ship one believable slice and prove it with real checks.
acceptance: A user can complete one meaningful workflow end to end.
Basic validation and failure handling exist.
The slice is covered by real checks, tests, or screenshots that can run in the loop.
notes: Do not stop at scaffolding if a runnable slice is possible.
Before calling it done, gather evidence that the slice actually works.
